Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM dbo.History WHERE TableID = @ID AND FormIdent = @FormIdent AND HistoryTypeID = @ChangeState AND [State] = @AcceptanceState ) ,1 ,0 )

SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMChange AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMChange' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMChange' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)
SELECT IIF( NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM @ITSMAssessmentChangeFakeSubForm ) ,1 ,0 )

SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMChange AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMChange' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMChange' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)

SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMChange AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMChange' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMChange' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)

SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMChange AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMChange' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMChange' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)

DataSource.SQL: UPDATE usr.ITSMAssessment SET IsApproved = @ApprovedState , ApproveDateTime = GETDATE() , ApprovedAccountID = @UserID , AssessmentComment = @DialogCommunication WHERE TableID = @ID AND FormIdent = @FormIdent AND AssessmentRoundGUID = @ActualAssessmentRoundGuid AND AssessmentOrder = ( SELECT MIN(sub.AssessmentOrder) FROM usr.ITSMAssessment sub WHERE sub.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND sub.TableID = @ID AND sub.AssessmentRoundGUID = @ActualAssessmentRoundGuid AND sub.State != 0 AND sub.IsApproved IS NULL ) AND IsApproved IS NULL AND State != 0

Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMAssessment WHERE TableID = @ID AND FormIdent = @FormIdent AND AssessmentRoundGUID = @ActualAssessmentRoundGuid AND IsApproved IS NULL AND State != 0 ) ,1,0 )

DataSource.SQL: UPDATE usr.ITSMChange SET ActualAssessmentRoundGuid = NEWID() WHERE ID = @ID

Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMChange AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMChange' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMChange' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)

DataSource.SQL: UPDATE usr.ITSMAssessment SET IsApproved = @ApprovedState , ApproveDateTime = GETDATE() , ApprovedAccountID = @UserID , AssessmentComment = @DialogCommunication WHERE TableID = @ID AND FormIdent = @FormIdent AND AssessmentRoundGUID = @ActualAssessmentRoundGuid AND AssessmentOrder = ( SELECT MIN(sub.AssessmentOrder) FROM usr.ITSMAssessment sub WHERE sub.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND sub.TableID = @ID AND sub.AssessmentRoundGUID = @ActualAssessmentRoundGuid AND sub.State != 0 AND sub.IsApproved IS NULL ) AND IsApproved IS NULL AND State != 0
UPDATE usr.ITSMChange SET ActualAssessmentRoundGuid = NEWID() WHERE ID = @ID
SELECT TOP(1) Guid FROM usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeSetting WHERE FunctionalKey = 'Canceled'

Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMChange AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMChange' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMChange' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)

StateDataSource.SQL: SELECT CASE FunctionalKey WHEN 'SmallChange' THEN 30 WHEN 'NormalChange' THEN 110 WHEN 'UrgentChange' THEN 190 ELSE 30 END FROM usr.ITSMChangeClassificationTypeSetting WHERE [Guid] = @ITSMChangeClassificationTypeGuid

DataSource.SQL:
IF EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMInovation WHERE ITSMChangeID = @ID AND State = @InRealizationState ) BEGIN DECLARE @UpdateIDs TABLE (ID INT) INSERT INTO @UpdateIDs (ID) SELECT ID FROM usr.ITSMInovation WHERE ITSMChangeID = @ID AND State = @InRealizationState
UPDATE usr.ITSMInovation SET State = @ForClosureState WHERE ID IN (SELECT ID FROM @UpdateIDs)
INSERT INTO dbo.History ( [FormIdent] ,[TableID] ,[CreateDate] ,[HistoryTypeID] ,[AccountID] ,[State] ,[Data] ,[SubTableID] ) SELECT [FormIdent] = 'ITSMInovation' ,[TableID] = ID ,[CreateDate] = DATEADD(MILLISECOND, 2, GETDATE()) ,[HistoryTypeID] = 'ChangeState' ,[AccountID] = @UserID ,[State] = 2 ,[Data] = NULL ,[SubTableID] = NULL FROM @UpdateIDs END

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @UpdateOutput TABLE (OldAssignedGroupID INT, NewAssignedGroupID INT)
UPDATE itsReq SET AssignedGroupID = ISNULL(itsCat.DefaultAssignedGroupID, itsGagbttap.GroupID) OUTPUT DELETED.AssignedGroupID AS OldAssignedGroupID, INSERTED.AssignedGroupID AS NewAssignedGroupID INTO @UpdateOutput (OldAssignedGroupID, NewAssignedGroupID) FROM usr.ITSMChange AS itsReq LEFT JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fot ON fot.Ident = COALESCE(itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident) LEFT JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMCategory AS itsCat ON itsCat.ID = fol.TableID AND fol.FormIdent = 'ITSMCategory' OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) * FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedGroupByFolderTreeAndPermission (COALESCE(itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident),@PermissionIDs) ) AS itsGagbttap WHERE itsReq.ID = @ID AND itsReq.[State] = 110 AND itsReq.AssignedGroupID IS NULL
IF EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM @UpdateOutput WHERE ISNULL(OldAssignedGroupID, -1) != ISNULL(NewAssignedGroupID, -1) ) BEGIN
DECLARE @LastHistoryID INT = usr.ITSM_GetLastHistoryID_ByFormIdentTableIDHistoryTypeIDAccountID('ITSMChange', @ID, 'Save', @UserID)
IF @LastHistoryID IS NOT NULL BEGIN
DECLARE @OldAssignedGroupID VARCHAR(MAX) ,@NewAssignedGroupID VARCHAR(MAX)
SELECT @OldAssignedGroupID = ISNULL(CAST(OldAssignedGroupID AS VARCHAR(MAX)), '') ,@NewAssignedGroupID = ISNULL(CAST(NewAssignedGroupID AS VARCHAR(MAX)), '') FROM @UpdateOutput
EXEC usr.ITSM_HistoryDataInsert @LastHistoryID, 'AssignedGroupID', @OldAssignedGroupID, @NewAssignedGroupID
END
END

Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMAssessment WHERE AssessmentRoundGUID = @ActualAssessmentRoundGuid AND AssessmentRoundStartDateTime IS NULL AND State != 0 ) AND EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMChange WHERE ID = @ID AND State = (60) ) ,1,0 )

DataSource.SQL: SELECT CAST([GUID] AS VARCHAR(MAX)) AS ITSMEntryMethodTypeGuid FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting WHERE FunctionalKey = 'itsm' AND [State] != @DeletedState
